steps.title: Use exponential growth form
steps.content: An exponential model with initial value $90$ and growth rate $20\%$ has the form $y=90(1+r)^x$, where $r=0.20$.

steps.title: Build the growth factor
steps.content:
Add the growth rate to $1$.
$$1+0.20=1.20$$ The model is $y=90(1.20)^x$. The answer is A.
